text:
Business Name: MelTech Computers
Category: Retail & Electronics
Location: Ring Road East, Accra, Ghana
Phone Contact: +233 30 222 3344
WhatsApp Contact: +233 24 555 1122
Opening Hours: Monday - Friday: 9:00 AM - 5:30 PM, Saturday: 9:00 AM - 2:00 PM
Accepted Payment Methods: Mobile Money, Visa/Mastercard, Cash
Delivery Options: Courier service within Accra (GHS 20-40), DHL for other regions
About Business / Description: A premium computer shop in Accra specializing in new and Grade-A clean refurbished laptops, accessories, and expert computer repair services.

Product: Lenovo ThinkPad T14 G2.
Category: Laptops.
Price: GHS 6,500.00.
Availability: Available.
Quantity in Stock: 8.
Warranty: 6 months.
Description: Core i7, 16GB RAM, 512GB SSD, Windows 11, excellent performance..

Product: HP ProBook 450 G8.
Category: Laptops.
Price: GHS 5,200.00.
Availability: Available.
Quantity in Stock: 4.
Warranty: 1 year.
Description: Core i5, 8GB RAM, 256GB SSD, 15.6 inch screen, brand new box..

Service: Laptop Screen Replacement.
Description: Professional screen replacement for major brands like HP, Dell, Lenovo..
Price: GHS 450.00.
Duration: 90 minutes.
Availability: Available.

Question: Do you sell new or used laptops?
Answer: We sell both brand new in box and Grade A clean refurbished laptops. Refurbished laptops undergo rigorous quality checks.

metadata.title: Do you sell new or used laptops?

text:
Question: What is your warranty policy?
Answer: We provide a 1-year warranty on brand new laptops and a 6-month warranty on refurbished laptops. Accessories have 1 month warranty.
